instructions: Scan the QR code using any UPI app
Or copy the UPI ID and make payment
Enter the event name and your details in payment description
Take a screenshot of payment confirmation
Transfer the amount to the above bank account
Use event name as reference in transaction
Include your name, phone number, and event details

paymentNote: All payments are processed manually. You will receive a confirmation within 24 hours of payment. For any payment related queries, please contact us on WhatsApp or email.
